name: coLssIdentRemoteSlave
title: coLssIdentRemoteSlave
syntax: void coLssIdentRemoteSlave( dword vendorId, dword productCode, dword revisionNoLow, dword revisionNoHigh, dword serialNoLow, dword serialNoHigh, dword errCode[] );
description: With this service the LSS master commands all LSS slaves whose LSS address matches the transmitted LSS address parameters to identify themselves.
